title: Amedisys Agrees to $3.3 Billion UnitedHealth Merger

(NYSE:MOH) fell sharply on Wednesday after UnitedHealth Group Inc (NYSE:UNH) said it expected the resumption of non-urgent surgeries to result in a rise in medical costs.
